ocr_findings.description: The 共通フレームと2つのSLCPの関係 table has broken cell content: multi-line cell values (e.g., 'システム\nライフサイクル\nプロセス') are split across Markdown table rows rather than rendered as single cells, and the IPA column value '共通フレーム' appears detached from its row. Table structure is recoverable but not clean.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 共通フレームと2つのSLCPの関係 (ISO/IEC 12207/15288 → JIS → IPA table) and 5つのプロセス section (image shows page number 200). All body text is faithfully captured. The table rendering is the main weakness — cells with line-wrapped Japanese labels are split across rows, but all data values (15288, X0170, 12207, X0160, 共通フレーム) are present.
